summary: Iter8 — 6-point punch-list testing. Backend: 7/8 pytests pass (test_iter8_punchlist.py). Brand-flash + cart-hydration + product-thumb visuals verified by Playwright. CRITICAL bug found in POS customer auto-create: when /api/checkout is called with admin/staff auth (the POS scenario), the code matches an existing Customer by user_id == auth_user.user_id BEFORE checking phone/email — so EVERY POS sale gets attached to the cashier's own customer record (one row in DB) instead of creating per-buyer customers. Reproducible: 8 distinct POS checkouts during testing all share customer_id=7161b02c (the iter7 demo-admin customer) and the names/phones from the new payloads are silently discarded because the update branch only writes when the existing field is empty. Second related bug: /api/admin/customers?q={local_phone like 0771234567} returns 0 results — DB stores '+9477...' so ILIKE '%0771234567%' never matches; punch-list explicitly requires this search to work. Workaround used by tests: anonymous /api/checkout (no auth header) and search by normalized '+94...' format. AUTO-DISCOUNT (sitewide 10%) verified end-to-end: marquee 'BLACK FRIDAY FLASH SALE !! 10% OFF SITEWIDE' visible on storefront, /api/discounts/active returns the row without auth, online checkout applies it, POS manual_discount_percent stacks on top, manual_discount_amount caps at subtotal. PNL endpoint correctly applies end-of-day to to_date (manual income posted today AND queried with from=today&to=today now appears in total_income — 12345.67 reflected) and exposes supplier_payments + total_income/total_expense fields. Receipt URL /receipt/{order_number} returns 200 unauthenticated. Brand-logo no-flash: first-paint after localStorage.removeItem('threadline_company_cache') shows the h-8 w-32 bg-zinc-900 animate-pulse skeleton — NOT the legacy 'Brand' fallback word. Test 1B (post-cache reload) was inconclusive because the playwright add_init_script kept clearing the cache on every navigation; visual inspection of screenshot shows skeleton + marquee + nav fully rendered with no flash artifact. ProductDetail color thumb strip + cart hydration could not be exercised in-browser this run (SPA reload fired before product cards finished hydrating in our wait window) — code review of cart.jsx confirms the hydrated-ref guard is present and correct, and ProductDetail.jsx code review confirms all variant images render with conditional opacity-40 dimming.

critical.issue: When the caller is an authenticated admin/staff user, server.py L1425-1426 short-circuits customer lookup to `WHERE user_id == current_user.user_id` BEFORE checking payload.customer_phone/email. Every POS sale therefore reuses the cashier's own customer record — buyers' names + phones in the payload are dropped (update branch L1440-1449 only writes when the existing field is empty). Punch-list test 'POS customer auto-create + Name/Phone search' is broken whenever cashier is logged in. Fix: when payload.source == 'pos' OR current_user.role != 'customer', skip the user_id match and only look up by payload.customer_phone / payload.customer_email; create a new Customer otherwise.

list_customers uses M.Customer.phone.ilike('%{q}%') only. DB stores normalised '+9477...' so searching '0771234567' (the format the cashier types per spec) returns 0 rows. Fix: also OR with M.Customer.phone.ilike('%{normalize_phone_lk(q)}%'). Punch-list explicitly requires the dropdown to surface the customer when '0771234567' is typed.

minor.issue: _build_order_response omits customer_id from the JSON — confirmed via DB introspection that orders DO have customer_id set, but admin UI cannot link to the customer page from order list. Cosmetic; not blocking.

action_items: FIX server.py /api/checkout (lines ~1424-1437): do NOT match Customer by user_id when payload.source == 'pos' OR current_user.role != 'customer'; otherwise every POS sale collapses onto the cashier's customer record.
FIX server.py /api/admin/customers list_customers: also OR phone ILIKE normalize_phone_lk(q) so cashiers can search by local '0771234567' format. Currently returns 0 hits for the documented spec UX.
Optional: surface customer_id in _build_order_response so the order list can link back to the customer.
critical_code_review_comments: company.jsx: readCache() runs at module scope inside CompanyProvider so the cache JSON is parsed once per provider mount — fine. But the cache is never invalidated on PUT /api/admin/company — admins editing the brand name will see the stale cached value until they refresh. Add a version stamp or key the cache by company.id+updated_at.

cart.jsx: hydrated.current ref correctly prevents the empty-on-mount race that wiped the cart. Good fix. discountForItem loops `discounts` (network-loaded) on every render of every line item — for a tenant with many discounts this becomes O(items*discounts) per render; consider memoising itemsWithPricing with useMemo.
POS.jsx (per file_of_reference): the new bestDiscount() helper + activeDiscounts loader is good, but verify it handles the empty-discounts case (active_discounts=[]) without throwing.
checkout.py business: instant_paid set still hardcodes 'koko_pos','mintpay_pos' — make sure POS-only payment methods are gated server-side from being picked on the storefront.
Server.py is now ~3095 lines — modularisation backlog from iter5/6/7 still pending.

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 pytests; 1 fail = customer search bug above)
success_rate.frontend: Brand-flash skeleton verified visually. Marquee + storefront layout confirmed. Cart-hydration + ProductDetail thumbs not exercised in-browser due to SPA timing — code review confirms implementation matches spec.

test_credentials: admin@demo.com / demo12345 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). No re-seeding required this iteration.
seed_data_creation: test_iter8_punchlist.py seeds (per session): TEST_iter8_cat_* (category), TEST_iter8_prod_* (product + 1 black/M variant) with 500 stock at online store, TEST_iter8_sitewide (10% sitewide discount, deleted at end of TestCheckoutAutoDiscount class), several TEST_iter8_buyer/pos/receipt orders + manual income 'TEST_iter8_inc' (12345.67 LKR). All entities prefixed TEST_iter8_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter8_punchlist.py -v after main agent fixes (a) the user_id-scoped customer dedup in POST /api/checkout (server.py ~L1425) and (b) list_customers q normalisation (server.py L1764). Customer test currently passes 7/8 with the local-phone search bug captured as the only failing assertion. Online checkout auto-discount + POS manual-discount + PNL EOD + manual income + supplier_payments field + receipt all green. Iter7 leftover customer (id 7161b02c..., name 'TEST_iter7 cod buyer', user_id=demo-admin) is what's masking the POS-customer-creation bug — direct DB introspection at /app/backend/database.py + models confirms only 3 customer rows total post-iter8 even though 10+ POS orders ran; iter8 anonymous online checkout did create a fresh customer (TEST_iter8_45b79). Frontend brand-cache effect of localStorage[threadline_company_cache] is correctly populated after first /api/company fetch — the only reason Test 1B 'no flash on reload' couldn't fully verify was that page.add_init_script kept clearing the key on every reload; first-paint NEVER showed the legacy 'Brand' fallback in any test path (skeleton shown instead).
rca of the issue: POS-customer bug RCA: server.py /api/checkout pre-iter8 already had the user_id branch but the issue surfaces visibly in iter8 because (a) iter7 left a Customer row whose user_id matches the demo-admin's user_9f7723a840f3, and (b) iter8 punch-list calls POS checkout with the admin token. Reproduction: POST /api/checkout {source:'pos', customer_name:'A', customer_phone:'+94770000010'} with Authorization=Bearer admin → response 200, but Order.customer_id == 7161b02c-... (cashier's own customer); actual buyer's name/phone are stored on the Order row but NOT on a Customer row. Mitigation (one-liner): change L1425 to `if user and user.role == 'customer': customer = await db.execute(select(...where user_id == user.user_id)).scalar_one_or_none()` so admin/staff sessions skip the auto-attach. Customer-search bug RCA: list_customers (server.py L1764-1778) builds an ILIKE filter only on the raw query string. DB always stores phones in +94 E.164 format (because POST /api/admin/customers and /api/checkout both run normalize_phone_lk first). Therefore a search like '0771234567' has zero overlap with '+94771234567' and ILIKE returns []. Mitigation: add `M.Customer.phone.ilike(f'%{normalize_phone_lk(q)}%')` as an extra OR clause.
